title: Jason / Michael
summary: Michael Donovan discussed the Strolid AI and Viconic integration, the rebuilding of the marketing team to focus on data-driven approaches, and introduced the BDC app for dealer campaigns. He emphasized the importance of orchestration in automation, aligning marketing and sales for account-based strategies, and empowering team members with new tools.

decisions.description: Integrate Strolid AI with Viconic for an AI show in Amsterdam, with plans to eventually bring Strolid AI fully into the Strolid brand.
Rebuild the Strolid marketing team with a focus on data-driven approaches and transparency.
Align marketing and sales to transition from lead generation to account-based marketing and experience.
Use the BDC app as an olive branch to Edwin.
Proceed with dashboards, including one for service.
Michael Donovan will get with Reed to get the tag manager done for the Rainbow store.

actionItems.task: Complete the session after work tonight to fix the BDC app.

expectedOutcome.description: The BDC app is functional with capabilities to scan a market and create email campaigns.

actionItems.task: Send an invite from the BDC app to Jason Branham.

expectedOutcome.description: Jason Branham receives an invitation to access the BDC app.

actionItems.task: Get with Reed to get the tag manager done for the Rainbow store.

expectedOutcome.description: Tag manager implemented for Rainbow store.

actionItems.task: Inform everyone regarding the next steps for analysis and automation.

expectedOutcome.description: Team members are aware of the next steps for analysis and automation

tensions: Debate about focusing on leads versus building relationships.
The delay in VIN Solutions API integration.
Concerns about Edwin creating his own email blast.
Vin's initial resistance to more dashboards.
referencesToPast: Previous marketing meeting which turned into a marathon meeting.
Past debates between Michael and Jason regarding lead generation vs. relationship building.
